value.expression: Request to delay delivery of Purchase Order No. $cust_po_num$ by $post_days$ days (Internal SO $sales_ord_no$) *** AUTOMATED EMAIL BY OPSVEDA ***

Dear Customer,
Can we delay the delivery of Purchase Order No. $cust_po_num$ by $post_days$ days? Following are the details of your Purchase Order:

PO Number: $cust_po_num$
Material No.: $mat_num$
Item No.: $item_no$
Quantity: $quant_num$
Internal Sales Doc: $sales_ord_no$
Current Requested Del. Date: $lrd_date$ (Can we postpone this by $post_days$ days?)

Since this is an automated email, please draft your response in the format provided below. You only have to change DECISION and NEW DELIVERY DATE (If DECISION is not "NO") values.
*** BEGIN RESPONSE ***
TYPE: CUSTOMER
DECISION: (YES/NO)
NEW ACCEPTED DELIVERY DATE: YYYY-MM-DD
*** END RESPONSE ***

Thank you.
Request to delay delivery of Purchase Order No. $cust_po_num$ by $post_days$ days (Internal SO $sales_ord_no$) *** AUTOMATED EMAIL BY OPSVEDA ***

Dear Customer,
Can we delay the delivery of Purchase Order No. $cust_po_num$ by $post_days$ days? Following are the details of your Purchase Order:

PO Number: $cust_po_num$
Material No.: $mat_num$
Item No.: $item_no$
Quantity: $quant_num$
Internal Sales Doc: $sales_ord_no$
Current Requested Del. Date: $lrd_date$ (Can we postpone this by $post_days$ days?)

Since this is an automated email, please draft your response in the format provided below. You only have to change DECISION and NEW DELIVERY DATE (If DECISION is not "NO") values.
*** BEGIN RESPONSE ***
TYPE: CUSTOMER
DECISION: (YES/NO)
NEW ACCEPTED DELIVERY DATE: YYYY-MM-DD
*** END RESPONSE ***

Thank you.
Request to Expedite Purchase Order No. $supply_po_num$ by $pre_days$ days *** AUTOMATED EMAIL BY OPSVEDA ***

Dear Vendor,
Can we expedite the delivery of Purchase Order No. $supply_po_num$ by $pre_days$ days? Following are the details of the Purchase Order:

PO Number: $supply_po_num$
Material No.: $mat_num$
Item No.: $item_no$
Quantity: $quant_num$
Current Stock Date: $cur_stock_date$ (We need the order $pre_days$ days prior to this date)

Since this is an automated email, please draft your response in the format provided below. You only have to change DECISION and NEW DELIVERY DATE (If DECISION is not "NO") values.
*** BEGIN RESPONSE ***
TYPE: VENDOR
DECISION: (YES/NO)
NEW DELIVERY DATE: YYYY-MM-DD
*** END RESPONSE ***

Thank you.
